step_rationale: Neutrophil antimicrobial peptide; marks acute neutrophil activation and inflammatory response during plaque destabilization.
mechanism: DEFA1 (human neutrophil defensin) is released by activated neutrophils and marks acute plaque inflammation and thrombotic risk.

references.title: Identification of Cardiometabolic Protein Biomarkers for Acute Myocardial Infarction Using Olink Proteomics.
